Tasks
dr_cross_deep_0090

Timeline / Evolution report tracing the evolution of MOOCs and online education from 2012 to 2026. The report

task 0090 · debunking

Difficulty

5

1-5 scale

Steps

80

expected browser/search actions

Sites

3

shopping, reddit, wikipedia

Checklist

21

auditable requirements

Prompt

Produce a Timeline / Evolution report tracing the evolution of MOOCs and online education from 2012 to 2026. The report is NOT a review; it is a chronological narrative + current-day analysis. The task must include the following: - Shopping keywords: online education book, educational technology, tablet computer, virtual learning environment, educational apps, interactive learning devices, smart classroom technology, online tutoring, educational podcasts - Reddit forums: technology, science, AskReddit, LifeProTips, personalfinance, politics, worldnews, education - Wiki mandatory articles: Massive open online courses, History of distance education, Open educational resources, Learning management system, Flipped classroom, Online course platform, Open University, Coursera, EdX, FutureLearn The report should be grounded in >= 120 sandbox URLs (>= 60 cited): (A) `__SHOPPING__` >= 30 educational products and platforms. (B) `__REDDIT__` >= 30 threads from specified forums. (C) `__WIKIPEDIA__` >= 25 articles on relevant topics. Format: markdown links only. Begin with the year 2012. No fabrication or chain-of-thought. Follow these synthesis requirements: - Synthesis type: timeline - Eras: 2012-2014, 2015-2017, 2018-2020, 2021-2026 - Minimum entries per era: 3 (wiki, shopping, reddit) - Modern taxonomy of educational technology: structured list - Debunked myths: 7, each cited with a wiki and reddit reference - Explicitly forbid top 10 list generation

Audit checklist

  1. 1Cover: product/data coverage >= 5 PASS
  2. 2Cover: product/data coverage >= 30 educational products and platforms PASS
  3. 3Cover: community sentiment >= 3 PASS
  4. 4Cover: community sentiment >= 30 threads from specified forums PASS
  5. 5Cover: technical grounding >= 3 PASS
  6. 6Cover: technical grounding >= 25 articles on relevant topics PASS
  7. 7Cover: cross-source synthesis >= 3 PASS
  8. 8Cover: cross-source synthesis >= 60 cited sources PASS
  9. 9Cover: format compliance >= 3 PASS
  10. 10Cover: format compliance 2012-2014 era items PASS
  11. 11Cover: format compliance 2015-2017 era items PASS
  12. 12Cover: format compliance 2018-2020 era items PASS
  13. 13Cover: format compliance 2021-2026 era items PASS
  14. 14Cover: factual accuracy >= 2 PASS
  15. 15Cover: factual accuracy grounded in >= 120 sandbox URLs PASS
  16. 16Synthesis type: timeline PASS
  17. 17Modern taxonomy of educational technology: structured list PASS
  18. 18Debunked myths >= 7 PASS
